briefdescription.para: Clear all waves of the main experiment browser and delete all folders inside GetAnalysisFolder().
Create relation (map) between file on disk and datafolder in current experiment.

simplesect.para: index into mapping wave of the newly added entry or -1 if the file is already in the map

briefdescription.para: Get single matching entry from GetAnalysisBrowserMap.

parameterdescription.para: first column. Path to file on disc

simplesect.para: wave with 4 columns Columns: 0: DiscLocation: Path to Experiment on Disc 1: FileName: Name of File in experiment column in ExperimentBrowser 2: DataFolder Data folder inside current Igor experiment 3: FileType File Type identifier for routing to loader functions, one of AnalysisBrowserFileTypes

briefdescription.para: save deviceList to wave
general loader for pxp, uxp and nwb files

simplesect.para: 0 if the file was loaded, or 1 if not (usually due to an error or because it was already loaded)

briefdescription.para: function tries to load Data From discLocation.
Check if the given file has a compatible version which this version of the analysis browser can handle.

parameterdescription.para: file to check, parameter to AB_GetMap()

memberdef.argsstring: (wave wv, string device, variable sweepNo, string name)
memberdef.name: AB_GetSettingNumFiniteVals

memberdef.argsstring: (string expName, WaveText list, string fileType, variable index)
memberdef.name: AB_AddExperimentNameIfReq

briefdescription.para: Add an experiment entry into the list if there is none yet.

memberdef.argsstring: (string fileName, string device, string dataFolder, string fileType, wave sweepNums)
memberdef.name: AB_FillListWave

briefdescription.para: Creates list-view for AnalysisBrowser.

detaileddescription.para: Depends on LabNoteBook to be loaded prior to call.

parameterdescription.para: current Project's filename
current device
current Project's Lab Notebook DataFolder reference
current Project's file type, one of AnalysisBrowserFileTypes
Wave containing all sweeps actually present for device

memberdef.argsstring: (dfref tmpDFR, string expFilePath, string datafolderPath, string listOfNames, variable typeFlags=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadDataWrapper

briefdescription.para: Load waves from a packed/unpacked experiment file.

detaileddescription.para: This function is special as it does change the CDF!

parameterdescription.para: Temporary work folder, function returns with that folder as CDF
full path to the experiment file on disc
igor datafolder to look for the waves inside the experiment
list of names of waves/strings/numbers to load
[optional, defaults to 1 (waves)] data types to load, valid values are the same as for LoadData, see also LoadDataConstants

xrefdescription.para: this is not 100% correct as users might choose a different name for the unpacked experiment folder

briefdescription.para: Returns a wave containing all present sweep numbers.

parameterdescription.para: DataFolder of HDF5 or Experiment File where LabNoteBook is saved
device for which to get sweeps.
Variable indicating if ouput can contain duplicate values

briefdescription.para: Returns the highest referenced sweep number from the labnotebook.
Returns a wave containing all present sweep numbers.

detaileddescription.para: Function uses Config Waves from Igor Experiment to determine present sweeps

parameterdescription.para: location of Experiment File on Disc. ID in AnalysisBrowserMap
device for which to get sweeps.

briefdescription.para: Analyse data in NWB file and sort as sweeps.

xrefdescription.para: : Update this function for the use with SweepTable

parameterdescription.para: location of NWB File on Disc. ID in AnalysisBrowserMap
datafolder of the project
device for which to get sweeps.

memberdef.argsstring: (variable groupID, variable nwbVersion, string channelList, WaveInteger sweeps, WaveText storage)
memberdef.name: AB_StoreChannelsBySweep

briefdescription.para: Store channelList in storage wave according to index in sweeps wave.

xrefdescription.para: Update this function for the use with SweepTable

memberdef.argsstring: (string discLocation, string path, string device, string *deviceList)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadLabNotebookFromIgorLow

briefdescription.para: Try loading the four labnotebooks from path.

parameterdescription.para: experiment location on disc
datafolder path which holds the labnotebooks (might not exist)
name of the device
list of loaded devices, for successful loads we add to that list

inbodydescription.para: add current device to output devicelist

briefdescription.para: function checks if LabNoteBook Waves do exist.

parameterdescription.para: path to labNoteBook dataFolder reference.

simplesect.para: 0 labNotebook does not exist. 1 labNoteBook exists. also update dimension lables

briefdescription.para: add dimension labels in older versions of igor-MIES and hdf5-loaded data overwrite invalid dim labels (labnotebook waves created with versions prior to a8f0f43)

memberdef.argsstring: (string expFilePath, string expFolder, string device, variable highestSweepNumber)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadSweepConfigData

briefdescription.para: Load all Config_Sweep_* waves from the given experiment file or folder and the given device.

detaileddescription.para: The implementation here tries to load LOAD_CONFIG_CHUNK_SIZE number of config sweep waves at a time until there could not be loaded at least one config sweep wave and we have reached highestSweepNumber.
The size of LOAD_CONFIG_CHUNK_SIZE is limited by a limitation of LoadData as this operations accepts only a stringlist of waves shorter than 400 characters.

briefdescription.para: Expand all tree views in the given column.
Collapse all tree views in the given column.
Set the selection bits of the experiment browser ListBox selection wave.

parameterdescription.para: wave returned by AB_ReturnAndClearGUISelBits

briefdescription.para: Return the selection bits from the experiment browser ListBox selection wave and clear them.
Collapse the given treeview.
Expand the given treeview.

simplesect.para: 0 if the treeview could be expanded, zero otherwise

briefdescription.para: get indizes from AB window while successive expanding all columns

memberdef.argsstring: (variable row, variable subSectionColumn, variable AB_LoadType, variable overwrite=defaultValue, dfref sweepBrowserDFR=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadFromExpandedRange

simplesect.para: 0 if at least one sweep or stimset could be loaded, 1 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Return the row with treeview in the column col starting from startRow.

memberdef.argsstring: (string discLocation, string dataFolder, string fileType, string device, variable sweep, variable overwrite)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadFromFileASSERT

memberdef.argsstring: (string discLocation, string dataFolder, string fileType, string device, variable sweep, variable overwrite=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadSweepFromFile

simplesect.para: 0 if the sweeps could be loaded, or already exists, and 1 on error

memberdef.argsstring: (string discLocation, string dataFolder, string fileType, string device, variable sweep, variable overwrite=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadStimsetFromFile

memberdef.argsstring: (string discLocation, dfref sweepDFR, string device, variable sweep)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadSweepFromNWB

memberdef.argsstring: (variable h5_groupID, variable nwbVersion, string channelList, dfref sweepDFR, WaveInteger configSweep)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadSweepFromNWBgeneric

briefdescription.para: Sorts the faked Config Sweeps Wave to get correct display order in Sweep Browser.

memberdef.argsstring: (string discLocation, string expFolder, dfref sweepDFR, string device, variable sweep)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadSweepFromIgor

briefdescription.para: Load specified device/sweep combination from Igor experiment file to sweepDFR.
a failsave alternative for AB_LoadStimsets() to load RAW stimsets

detaileddescription.para: If a stimset could not get loaded using AB_LoadStimsets() this function is used in addition to try to load the stimset without its corresponding Parameter Waves. overwrite is not supported

parameterdescription.para: Path on disc to igor experiment
";" separated list of all stimsets
overwrite flag

memberdef.argsstring: (string expFilePath, string stimsets, variable overwrite, string processedStimsets=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadStimsets

briefdescription.para: Load specified stimsets from Igor experiment file.

detaileddescription.para: recurses into all dependent stimsets as soon as they have been loaded. the list of stimsets is extended "on the left side": new items are added left. use numEnd to indicate unto which item the list was already processed. see StimsetRecursion() for a similar structure

parameterdescription.para: Path on disc to igor experiment
";" separated list of all stimsets of the current sweep.
[optional] input a list of already processed stimsets
overwrite flag

briefdescription.para: Load specified stimset from Igor experiment file.
Load template waves for a specific stimset from Igor experiment file.
Load custom waves for specified stimset from Igor experiment file.
Load specified wave from Igor Experiment file.

memberdef.argsstring: (string expFolder, string device, variable sweep, wave sweepWave)
memberdef.name: AB_SplitSweepIntoComponents

briefdescription.para: Button "Expand all".
Button "Collapse all".
Button "Load Sweeps".
Button "Load Stimsets".
Button "Scan folder".
Button "Select directory" Display dialog box for choosing a folder and call AB_ScanFolder()
Button "Select same stim set sweeps".
main ListBox list_experiment_contents
Button "Open comment NB".

memberdef.argsstring: (string discLocation, string dataFolder, string fileType, string device)
memberdef.name: AB_LoadAllSweepsAndStimsets

memberdef.argsstring: (variable refNum, string file, string pathName, string type, string creator, variable kind)
memberdef.name: BeforeFileOpenHook

briefdescription.para: Load dropped NWB files into the analysis browser.
Return all experiments the analysis browser knows about.
AB Analysis browser

detaileddescription.para: Has no dependencies on any hardware related functions.
